title: KHAWZAWLAH BANA KAIH CM SPECIAL PACKAGE SEM CHHUAHNA HUN HMANG
content:
609/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 20th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, District Monitoring Committee Chairman ni bawk kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah Bana kaih scheme hnuaia CM Special Package dawng tura thlan mi 10 hnenah certificate leh placard semna hun hman a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Khawzawl dsitrict chhunga department hrang hrangte chu hna an thawk tha-in mipuite pawh an taima a tih thu a sawi a. Vawiina CM Special Package dawngtute chu tanpuina an dawn dinchhuahpui thei khawpa hmang tangkai turin leh theihtawp chhuah turin a chah.

Vawiin inkhawmah hian SDC Pu R. Lalrinhlua hnen atangin Bana kaih chungchang leh scheme thil tumte ngaihthak a ni a. DRDO RAO Pu F. Malsawmtluanga chuan sumdawnna-a sum leh pai enkawl dan zirtirna a pe bawk a. Khawzawl Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana leh line department hotute pawh an tel a ni.

CM Special package dawngtute chu a hnuaia tarlante hi an ni

title: CHIEF MINISTER’S CHARITABLE TRUST BOARD OF TRUSTEES HOLDS ANNUAL MEETING
content:
94/2026-2027

Aizawl, 20 May 2026:The Board of Trustees of the Chief Minister’s Charitable Trust, chaired by Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma, held its Annual Meeting today at the Chief Minister’s Office.

During the meeting, the Board agreed to open the Chief Minister’s Charitable Trust for use by Government Departments, Societies, NGOs, and individuals as a channel for receiving Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) support.

The Annual Meeting reviewed the Trust’s financial status for the previous year and appointed the Trust Auditor and Pro Bono Advisor for the Financial Year 2025–26. Smt R. Lalrodingi was appointed as Chief Executive Officer of the Board, while Shri Raymond Lalmuanate was appointed as Secretary.

The Board also stressed the importance of obtaining registration under the Foreign Contribution Regulation Act (FCRA) to enable the Trust to legally receive donations from abroad, and resolved to pursue the matter.

The meeting further agreed to collaborate wherever possible with the Mizoram Corporate Social Responsibility Cell (CSR Cell).

It was also decided that Government Departments under the Mizoram Government requiring an implementing agency for CSR projects may utilise the Chief Minister’s Charitable Trust for that purpose. Likewise, Societies, NGOs, and individuals who receive CSR support and require an implementing agency may also engage the Trust.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER'S CHARITABLE TRUST BOARD OF TRUSTEES THUKHAWM
content:
608/2026-2027

Aizawl the 20th May 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma kaihhruaiin Chief Minister's Charitable Trust Board of Trustees te chuan CM Office-ah Annual Meeting an nei a. Chief Minister's Charitable Trust chu Department, Society, NGOs leh mimal pawhin CSR dawnthleng atana an hman theih tura inhawn an remti.

Board of Trustees Annual Meeting hian kum kalta chhunga an sum dinhmun an thlirlet a, Financial Year 2025-26 atana Trust Auditor tur leh Pro Bono Advisor tur an ruat a. Board Chief Executive Officer atan Pi R. Lalrodingi leh Secretary atan Pu Raymond Lalmuanate chu an ruat.

Ram pawn atanga dan ang taka tanpuina (Donation) dawn theihna Foreign Contribution Regulation Act (FCRA) registration neih tha an ti a. Hmalak zui a ni ang. Mizoram Corporate Social Responsibility Cell (CSR Cell) nena thawh dun theihna awm apianga thawh dun an remti bawk.

Mizoram sorkara Department hrang hrangten CSR dil chhuah an neih changa Implementing Agency an mamawhin Chief Minister's Charitable Trust hi Agency-ah an hmang thei ang.

Chutiang bawkin, Society, NGO leh mimalin CSR an hmuha Agency an mamawh chuan he Trust hi hman theih a ni bawk ang.

Chief Minister's Charitable Trust-ah hian Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister chu Settlor a ni a, Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Secretary to CM leh Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, P&PI te chu ex- officio Trustee an ni.

Attachment

title: Lawngtlaiah DCC, DLRC leh DLSC for the Quarter ending March 2026 leh Special DCC for 2026- 2027 an ṭhukhawm
content:
607/2026-2027

Dated Lawngtlai, 20th May 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan Lawngtlai District Consultative Committee (DCC), District Level Review Committee (DLRC) leh District Level Security Committee (DLSC) for the Quarter Ending May, 2026 chu Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii SDO (S)  kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhukhawm.

Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii chuan Bank hrang hrang aiawh lokalte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. A bik takin sawrkarin Scheme emaw programme - a kalpuiahte chak zawka loan pek chhuah a pawimawh hle tiin, hemi kawnga ngaihtuahna thar nei turin a chah a. Mipuiten hamthatna an neih hrang hrang an hriat zung zung theihna tur leh bank dawr kawngah harsatna an tawh lohna tura Financial Literally Campaign (FLC) ngaipawimawh thar turin a fuih a. Bank- te chu FLC nei ngei ngei thin tura chahin, a tul dan ang a sawrkar line department hrang hrangte nena thawkho thiam turin a chah a. SDO (S) chuan Bank - te chu Lawngtlai mipuiten an dawr nasa tih hriaa, mipuite lo dawngsawng thiam fo thin turin a ngen nghal bawk.

He ṭhutkhawmah hian Lead Bank Office-a Lead District Manager (Lawngtlai & Siaha) Pu JM Soren leh Reserve Bank of India (RBI) aiawh bakah, bank hrang hrang leh line department ai awhte an tel a ni.

He hunah hian meeting hmasa, February  ni 2, 2026-a DCC meeting minute chu pawm a ni a. Kum 2025 chhunga Lawngtlai District-a bank hrang hrangte hna thawh thlir let niin, hmachhawp an neih leh hma lak zui dan tur te sawi ho nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Financial Unclusion Plan (FIP) hnuaiah Lawngtlai District chhunga mihring 2,000 chunglam chenna khaw tinah mipuiin bank kal tlanga hamṭhatna hrang hrang an chhawr ve theih nan an khuaah bank branch emaw, business correspondent emaw, Indian Postal Payment Bank emaw dah tura hma lakna kalpui mek a nih thu leh tun dinhmunah Lawngtlai District chhungah Bank Branch- 12, ATM Booth -8, Business correspondent- 84,Financial Literacy Centre- 1, leh Indian Postal Payment Bank-1, a awm mek thu tar lan a ni a. January - March 2026 chhunga khan  bank hrang hrang, Lead Bank leh CFL kal tlangin mipui hnena sum hman leh enkawl dan inzirtirna (financial literacy campaign) ṭum- 70 buatsaih a nih thu tar lan niin, line department-te nena ṭang hovin bank-te'n FLC tam zawk buatsaih turin hma lak chhunzawm se, tih a ni.

Pawisa dah hmasa lo (zero balance)-a account hawn theihna, Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) leh social security scheme hrang hrang - Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY), Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) etc. lama bank hma lak dan te thlir ho niin, mipui tam zawkin he'ng hamṭhatnate hi an chhawr theih nan ṭan lak lehzual ni se, tih a ni a. Bank-a mipuiin sum an dah luh (deposit) zat za zela bank-in mipuia sum an puktir (credit) zat chhutna, Credit/Deposit Ratio-ah Lawngtlai District-a bank-te chuanarch  2026-ah CD Ratio 108.88% an nei tih tar lan a ni a, December 2025 (120. 90%) nen khaikhinin CD Ratio hi 12. 02 %-in a thlahniam  a ni.

Kum 2025-2026 sawrkar kum chhunga Lawngtlai District chhunga bank-te'n loan an pek chhuah dan tur, Annual Credit Plan (ACP) ruahman atangin March 2026 thleng khan bank-te hian Priority Sector hnuaiah 100.43 % leh Non- Proirity Sector hnuaiah 296.77 % loan an pe chhuak tawh a ni. March , 2026 thleng khan PMEGP hnuaiah loan nuai 88.53  hu pek niin, DAY- NRLM/ MzSLRM - ah nuai 288.97, PMMY - ah nuai 618.07 leh KCC loan nuai 1851.90 hu pek chhuah a ni.

He hunah hian kum 2026-2027 chhunga Lawngtlai District chhunga bank-te'n loan an pek chhuah dan tur, Annual Credit Plan (ACP) ruahmanna an neih chu chu thlir ho a ni a. Bank leh mipui sum vawn himna (security) lam te leh pawisa leng vel (currency management & remittance) chungchang bakah Bank zawng zawngten quarter tawp atanga ni 15 chhung ngei a FLC data submit ni se tih an rel  a. Bank Branch zawng zawnga awm ngei ngei tur - Security Guards,  CCTV, Fire Extinguisher leh Security Alarm- te chu ngaihpawimawh thar ni se an ti bawk.

Attachment

title: Sport Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Yonex-Sunrise PC Gabriel Lalliansanga Memorial MBA Junior Official Badminton Championship, 2026 hawnna a hmanpui.
content:
606/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 20th May, 2026 :Nimin khan Sport Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Yonex-Sunrise PC Gabriel Lalliansanga Memorial MBA Junior Official Badminton Championship, 2026 hawnna inkhawm Ramhlun Indoor Stadium-a neih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui. Pu PC Lallawmsanga, IPS DGP (Rtd.) chu khualzahawm a ni.

Khuallian chuan thusawiin, Mizoram sawrkarin ruihhlo do kawnga nasa taka hma a lak mek laiin, kalkawm zingah ruihhloin a tihbuailoh thalai tam tak a hmu chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi. Mizoramin sports-ah nasa taka hmasawnin, Badminton chu sport discipline hmasawnna hmu nasa tak a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoramin hun reilote chhungin junior leh Sub-junior-ahte champion leh potential champion tam tak an lo chhuak chu a lawm thu sawiin, inzirtirna tha/dik (right training) nena hmalak a nih chuan, badminton chuan  tun dinhmun aia sang zawk a thleng anga, infiammi tha tak tak an lo chhuah belh zel a rin thu a sawi. Minister chuan sawrkarin Olympic 2036 hmathlir neiin a bulthut atangin sports a kalpui tih a sawi a, Mizote thiam zawng, India-ah pawh a thatna Olympic sports discipline thlanchhuah pariat - Archery, Badminton, Boxing, Hockey, Judo, Taekwondo, Weightlifting leh Wrestling - ahte mithiam (Exellence) zawnchhuah leh chherchhuah an tum tih a sawi a , Infiammite chu Olympic Games khel pha thei tura tan la tura fuihin , Olympic vision nei turin a chah a ni. Sports infiamna hian taksa, rilru leh ngaihtuahna thlengin hriselna a thlen a, hei vang hian mihringte hriselna atan hian infiamna hi damdawi tha a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Khualzahawm Pu PC Lallawmsanga pawhin thu sawiin, kalkhawmte chu infiamna uar turin a chah a, infiamna hian mahni invawnna (discipline) a ken tel avangin, zirna lamah te pawh min pui theih thu a sawi. Hlawhtlinna chang tur chuan bul tan hma a pawimawhzia hria a, Mizoram sawrkarin grassroot level atanga infiammite tih hmasawnna kawng a ngaihtuah chu lawmawm a tih thu sawi bawk. Exise & Narcotics Dept. aiawhin Pu Peter Zohmingthangqa chuan thu sawiin, kakhawmte chu ruihhlo laka fimkhur zel tur leh tichhin ve lo turin a chah a, invawng taka nung a, India leh khawvel-ahte Mizoram tihmingthatu ni thei turin a fuih bawk. Pu Peter-a kaihhruaiin kalkhawmte hian ruihhlo ti velo tura intiamna an nei bawk a ni.

MBA hruaitute atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a. Pu Laltanpuia, Treasurer, MBA chuan lawmthu sawinain inkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment
